label: Software Engineer - MS Department of Finance
headline: Senior .NET Software Engineer – Application Modernization, Database Engineering & Security (C#, .NET Core, VB.NET, SQL Server, IBM DB2)

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Developed and maintained .NET Core services with Hangfire and Entity Framework over PostgreSQL and SQL Server to support complex insurance auto-protect workflows.
Maintained existing WinForms and web applications, establishing unit-testing patterns and documenting deployment steps to improve stability and facilitate knowledge transfer.
Collaborated with product to triage production issues in legacy code and refactor risky areas, aligning with application modernization goals.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Azure DevOps
description: Led delivery of GLP-compliant lab software requiring dynamic user-defined data models and custom reporting, ensuring data integrity, traceability, and audit trails for application and database security.
Designed and built ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI services with RESTful OData and SOAP endpoints backed by Oracle using nHibernate, Entity Framework, and PL/SQL.
Guided release engineering and Azure DevOps practices for builds, deployments, and database migrations, providing complex technical support for the platform.
Mentored less experienced developers through code reviews and pairing, fostering improved quality and knowledge transfer.

prestage-farms.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Led a team of 6 developers and 3 QA to modernize VB6 accounting and inventory systems into a single WinForms .NET application with role-based security, directly addressing application upgrade and enhancement.
Analyzed legacy VB6 patterns and built transformation modules to automate conversion to VB.NET while preserving business logic, demonstrating development of improved applications and techniques.
Built a new reporting frontend that supported legacy outputs while adding PDF generation, enhancing functionality through database and application changes.
Ran Agile roadmaps and milestones, coordinating stakeholders and demos to deliver the modernization ahead of schedule, showcasing project management and problem-solving skills.

rural-sourcing.title: Senior Software Developer
description: Delivered Microsoft-stack projects for multiple clients, specializing in WinForms, ASP.NET, and SQL Server application creation and implementation.
Mentored junior and mid-level developers on coding standards, testing habits, and practical estimation, contributing to knowledge transfer.
Planned and tracked sprints, risks, and milestones while keeping stakeholders aligned across simultaneous projects, demonstrating leadership and problem-solving.

hancock-whitney.title: Programmer/Analyst I
description: Developed desktop applications that pulled from Access and IBM DB2/Argo Data sources for banking teams, demonstrating experience with multiple database technologies.

Designed and implemented SQL Server applications to support internal web and desktop tools, including data-driven ASP pages with validation JavaScript, emphasizing database design and application creation.
Implemented reporting and data-access front-ends to surface financial data accurately, contributing to application functionality enhancement.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer/Architect
description: Developed and maintained RETS client and server software on Oracle and C#, achieving protocol compliance and reliable data handling for complex real estate integrations.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends where branding and business rules were driven by XML, demonstrating application design and creation expertise.
Created a market analytics and statistics module surfacing deep MLS metrics for brokers and administrators, enhancing application functionality.

not-rocket-science.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server development for Zen-Noh Grain, supporting inventory and operations workflows and making changes to enhance functionality.
Designed database schemas and service endpoints to keep data consistent across web and mobile surfaces, demonstrating database design expertise.
Built a C# mobile application for a Sheriff's department to capture and sync field data, showcasing application creation in multiple programming languages.

rainmaker.title: Design Consultant
description: Built components and frontends in VB6, VB.NET, ASP Classic, and ASP.NET Web Forms with Access and SQL Server backends, demonstrating experience with multiple .NET and database technologies.
Delivered reporting and data-entry tools tailored to client campaigns and internal operations, contributing to application creation and enhancements.
